source_text: Implementations SHOULD do a key update as described in Section 4.6.3 prior to reaching these limits.
rule_statement: Implementations SHOULD perform a key update before reaching cryptographic usage limits for the AEAD algorithm.
applies_when: Approaching AEAD usage limits (e.g., ~2^24.5 records for AES-GCM)
expected_value: key update performed before limit reached
checkability_rationale: Can verify key update happens but reaching actual limits requires many records.
